column2: R c вҖӢ ( g вҲЈ p ) subscript рқ‘… рқ‘җ conditional рқ‘” рқ‘қ \displaystyle R_{c}(g\mid p)
column3: = { R s вҖӢ ( g вҲЈ p ) if is_safety вҖӢ ( p ) вҖӢ or вҖӢ R s вҖӢ ( g вҲЈ p ) < 0.15 R h вҖӢ ( g вҲЈ p ) otherwise absent cases subscript рқ‘… рқ‘  conditional рқ‘” рқ‘қ if is_safety рқ‘қ or subscript рқ‘… рқ‘  conditional рқ‘” рқ‘қ 0.15 subscript рқ‘… в„Һ conditional рқ‘” рқ‘қ otherwise \displaystyle=\begin{cases}R_{s}(g\mid p)&\text{if }\textsc{is\_safety}(p)\text{ or }R_{s}(g\mid p)<0.15\\ R_{h}(g\mid p)&\text{otherwise}\end{cases}

column2: R ~ c вҖӢ ( g вҲЈ p ) subscript ~ рқ‘… рқ‘җ conditional рқ‘” рқ‘қ \displaystyle\tilde{R}_{c}(g\mid p)
column3: = whiten вҖӢ ( logit вҖӢ ( R c вҖӢ ( g вҲЈ p ) ) ) absent whiten logit subscript рқ‘… рқ‘җ conditional рқ‘” рқ‘қ \displaystyle=\textsc{whiten}(\textsc{logit}(R_{c}(g\mid p)))
